warnings.text: Fall risk detected: Margaret showing unsteady gait pattern with lateral sway exceeding safe threshold.
Fall detected in hallway. Harold found on ground, unable to self-recover. Emergency response initiated.
Betty attempted to stand from wheelchair without assistance. High fall risk — staff alerted.
Prolonged inactivity: Frank has not moved from bed for over 4 hours. Wellness check recommended.
Social isolation alert: Dorothy has not interacted with other residents for 48 hours.
Wandering detected: Harold found near emergency exit at 2:30 AM. Night staff notified.
Unusual night activity: Margaret has been pacing the corridor for 45 minutes after midnight.
Missed medication window: Betty did not pick up 10 AM prescriptions. Nurse follow-up needed.
Missed meal: Frank did not attend lunch service. Tray delivery scheduled.
Missed meal: Dorothy skipped breakfast for the second consecutive day.
Reduced mobility: Harold's walking speed has decreased 30% over the past week.
Bathroom visit frequency increased: Margaret visited 8 times today, above normal baseline.
Prolonged inactivity: Betty remained seated in common area for 3 hours without movement.
Positive interaction: Margaret and Dorothy engaged in 40-minute conversation in the garden.
Group activity: Harold, Betty, and Frank participated in afternoon card game for 1 hour.
Assisted walking: Dorothy completed two laps of the corridor with physical therapist support.
Social engagement: Margaret joined the morning exercise class with 5 other residents.
Positive interaction: Harold and Frank had a 25-minute conversation over coffee in the lounge.
Sleep disruption: Betty woke 4 times during the night. Sleep quality declining over past 3 days.
Fall risk: Dorothy using furniture for balance support instead of walker. Equipment compliance issue.
Family visit: Margaret received visitors for 2 hours. Mood and engagement noticeably improved.
Weight change alert: Frank's weekly weigh-in shows 2kg loss over 2 weeks. Dietary review needed.
Choking risk detected: Harold eating alone and coughing repeatedly during dinner. Staff alerted.
Positive interaction: All five residents gathered for movie night. High engagement observed.
Agitation detected: Betty exhibiting restless behavior and repeated attempts to leave the facility.
